title: Future Proves Past Framing
summary: Drop #9 introduced one of the most repeated Q slogans: 'Future proves past.' The phrase became central to retrospective interpretation practices in Q communities.
raw_text:
Future proves past.
Learn.
Think.
Q

lines.fact: The phrase is not tied to a specific verifiable claim.
lines.theory: Followers used the slogan to retrospectively connect future events to earlier vague drops.
lines.context: This framing mechanism can become unfalsifiable because later events are selectively matched to ambiguous earlier statements.
lines.questions: What objective criteria determine whether a later event truly validates an earlier prediction?
lines.Deltas: 2018-2025: Phrase repeatedly cited by Q communities when linking later political events to earlier drops.
